summary: End-to-end UI verification of RLS bug fix + reset-password UI on PhysioSchedule. All 5 requested checks PASS. Therapist (emp 19352) successfully created 'QA Test Patient' + appointment against a DIFFERENT therapist (Ms Binudi) with no 'Could not create patient' RLS error. Admin (26754) sees the same appointment. Appointment cancelled via UI (drawer Cancel -> confirm dialog 'Cancel appointment'). Reset password button correctly disabled under 6 chars, enabled at 9 chars, success toast 'Password reset for Ms Manthi. They are signed out everywhere.' Regression: therapist still sees all 8 therapist columns on /calendar.

issues: (Same as iteration_1) Non-blocking React SSR hydration mismatch warning on root layout — noisy console error, functionality unaffected.

action_items: MANUAL CLEANUP RECOMMENDED: The 'QA Test Patient' record (phone 0771234567) still exists in the patients table (no delete-patient UI is exposed on /patients). Suggest either (a) adding a delete option on the Patients page or (b) manually removing it from Supabase to keep test data out of production. The appointment itself has been cancelled via the UI.

(Optional) 'Cancel' button label in the appointment drawer is ambiguous — it reads just 'Cancel' inside the drawer but 'Cancel appointment' inside the confirm dialog. Consider making the drawer button label 'Cancel appointment' for consistency.
critical_code_review_comments: clinic-store.tsx addAppointment: after inserting a new patient the local patients state is not updated before the appointment insert reads from patientsMapRef — realtime channel eventually populates it, but there is a brief window where rowToAppointment resolves patient name to '(unknown patient)'. Consider setPatients(prev => [...prev, newP]) right after successful patient insert.
booking-modal.tsx: no loading spinner on the Book appointment button — the busy state changes label to 'Saving…' which is fine, but disabled styling could be more prominent.
Reset password field is not cleared on dialog close in some cases (minor).
test_credentials: Admin 26754 / Hemas@123; Therapist 19352 / Hemas@123; Reset target L2020 (Ms Manthi) — password kept as Hemas@123 (no change).
seed_data_creation: Created and then CANCELLED one appointment (QA Test Patient with Ms Binudi @ 8:30-9:15 on 2026-07-07). Patient row 'QA Test Patient' remains in patients table — see action_items for manual cleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: RLS fix is confirmed working end-to-end: a therapist can add a new patient + book an appointment for ANOTHER therapist column without hitting the 'row violates row-level security policy for table patients' error. Admin visibility of therapist-created appointments confirmed. Reset password UI verified (button disabled logic + success toast with signed-out message). All 8 therapist columns remain visible to therapist role (regression preserved). Booking flow selectors: modal has 3 comboboxes scoped inside [role=dialog] (patient / therapist / slot). Confirm-cancel alertdialog uses button labels 'Keep appointment' + 'Cancel appointment'. Sonner toasts render at bottom-right and match on [data-sonner-toast].
